framework.name: Agentic Commerce Protocol (ACP) Standard
framework.description: Open source protocol co-developed by Stripe and OpenAI that creates a shared language between AI agents and merchants, allowing one-to-many integrations while preserving merchant control over brand, products, and fulfillment.
framework.raw_quote: ACP was co-developed with OpenAI as a standard protocol. It's actually open sourced under the Apache 2.0 their license and it gives agents and sellers this shared language

source.title: The Race to Standardize Agentic Commerce
